report_text:
--- CAPABILITIES (CAPA) ---

TECHNIQUE TRIGGERS (9):
  - accept command line arguments
  - query or enumerate registry value
  - link function at runtime on Windows
  - get geographical location
  - get file size
  - get disk size
  - get common file path
  - persist via Run registry key
  - packed with UPX

CAPA RULE MATCHES (MBC):
  - Data::Modulo [C0058]
  - Memory::Allocate Memory [C0007]
  - Cryptography::Generate Pseudo-random Sequence [C0021]
  - Operating System::Registry::Create Registry Key [C0036.004]
  - Operating System::Registry::Open Registry Key [C0036.003]
  - File System::Create File [C0016]
  - Anti-Behavioral Analysis::Dynamic Analysis Evasion::Delayed Execution [B0003.003]
  - Anti-Behavioral Analysis::Debugger Detection::Process Environment Block [B0001.019]
  - contain loop
  - Execution::Command and Scripting Interpreter [E1059]
  - Operating System::Registry::Query Registry Value [C0036.006]
  - link function at runtime on Windows
  - get geographical location
  - File System::Read File [C0051]
  - File System::Writes File [C0052]
  - Discovery::File and Directory Discovery [E1083]
  - Process::Set Thread Local Storage Value [C0041]
  - get thread local storage value
  - Discovery::System Information Discovery [E1082]
  - File System::Create Directory [C0046]
  - get OS version
  - Operating System::Registry::Set Registry Key [C0036.001]
  - File System::Copy File [C0045]
  - Persistence::Registry Run Keys / Startup Folder [F0012]
  - contain a resource (.rsrc) section

--- FILE IDENTITY ---

PE IMPORTS (DANGEROUS):
  KERNEL32.DLL: GetProcAddress, VirtualAlloc

COMPILER AND PACKER:
  [Compiler] Borland Delphi
  [Linker] Turbo Linker

PE SECTIONS (entropy):
  UPX0         entropy=4.31
  UPX1         entropy=5.4
  .rsrc        entropy=2.72
  .imports     entropy=4.61
  [overlay]    entropy=7.973541259765625  size=9228
